description_long: This is a rectangular wooden serving tray featuring a neatly arranged assortment of sushi, including nigiri and maki rolls, placed on top. The tray also holds two small round bowls, one filled with a green paste (likely wasabi) and the other with a dark liquid (likely soy sauce). A pair of wooden chopsticks rests on the tray, positioned parallel to its shorter edge. The sushi pieces are visually distinct, with vibrant colors such as orange, white, and green, and the maki rolls are wrapped in dark green seaweed. The tray itself is light-colored wood with a smooth, flat surface and short block feet for elevation. The overall presentation is clean and organized, evoking a traditional Japanese dining experience.
description: A light wooden serving tray with sushi, two small bowls, and a pair of chopsticks arranged neatly on top. The tray is elevated on short feet and features a visually appealing, organized presentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sushi, bowls, and chopsticks arranged symmetrically on the tray, with all items clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elevation of the tray on short block feet and the alignment of sushi and bowls along the tray's length.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the bowls of wasabi and soy sauce at the near edge, with sushi and chopsticks extending away from the viewer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sushi and bowls from the other side, with chopsticks placed at the far end of the tray.
attribute_rim_design: The rim is minimal and flat, with no raised edges or lips; the tray's edge is straight and flush with the surface.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface of the tray appears matte to slightly smooth, with minimal reflectivity and no visible glare or highlights. The ceramic bowls may have a slightly higher sheen, but overall the object is not glossy.
